title: ASR Outdoor Nylon Camping Vest Gold Panning Adjustable Hunting Fishing Jacket
description:
The ASR Outdoor camping vest is constructed of durable nylon material that is weather-resistant, so you can count on it to hold up rain or shine. It’s a great clothing accessory for outdoor activities like hunting, fishing, and gold panning. The hunting and fishing vest features 9” adjustable side straps, and measures 23.5” x 20” but adjusts larger for a custom fit. This vest is designed to fit most adults, making it a great option for both men and women outdoor enthusiasts. The ASR Outdoor nylon was designed with reinforced shoulder areas which will allow the wearer extra comfort. The durable construction ensures that all of your hunting and fishing equipment is easily accessible and safely stored during outdoor activities

ASR Outdoor Nylon Camping Vest Gold Panning Adjustable Hunting Fishing Jacket

The ASR Outdoor camping vest is constructed of durable nylon material that is weather-resistant, so you can count on it to hold up rain or shine. It’s a great clothing accessory for outdoor activities like hunting, fishing, and gold panning.

Key Features

  • DURABLE NYLON CAMPING VEST - The ASR Outdoor camping vest is constructed of durable nylon material that is weather-resistant, so you can count on it to hold up rain or shine. It’s a great clothing accessory for outdoor activities like hunting, fishing, and gold panning.
  • ADJUSTABLE DESIGN - The hunting and fishing vest features 9” adjustable side straps, and measures 23.5” x 20” but adjusts larger for a custom fit. This vest is designed to fit most adults, making it a great option for both men and women outdoor enthusiasts.
  • REINFORCED SHOULDERS - The ASR Outdoor nylon was designed with reinforced shoulder areas which will allow the wearer extra comfort. The durable construction ensures that all of your hunting and fishing equipment is easily accessible and safely stored during outdoor activities.
  • VERSATILE MULTI-USE VEST - The vest features 8 different pockets and 2 metal clips that will hold your camping and hiking gear like fishing lines, tackles, whistle, compass, pocket knife and matches. You can fill it up with everything you’ll need while you’re out in the field whether you’re hunting, fishing or gold prospecting.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 23.5” x 20” (L x W), adjusts larger (one size fits most); Pockets: 8; Metal clips: 2; Adjustable side straps for a custom fit; Reinforced shoulder areas; Colors: Brown and green; Material: weather-resistant nylon

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRONCVST23
  • UPC: 810058487278
  • Color: Brown
  • Size: L
